pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the maven-jar-plugin to generate a manifest with classpath and main class.
Configure the maven-shade-plugin to create an executable uber-jar.

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Controller.general_idea: Added imports for VBox and HBox layout containers to support the new Admin UI components.
Added FXML field injections for Admin login form, management tab, and logout controls.
Added an ObservableList for Admins to support the admin management table view.
Initialized the Admin table columns and set its items in the initialize method.
Added a helper method to configure cell value factories for the Admin table columns.
Refactored voter verification to fetch the full Voter object instead of a boolean, allowing for better error messages and state checks.
Added a confirmation dialog before casting a vote to prevent accidental submissions.
Moved voter list loading to a background thread to prevent UI freezing during data retrieval.
Added a placeholder label to the voter table to indicate loading state or empty results.
Implemented the admin login handler to authenticate users and toggle UI visibility.
Implemented the admin logout handler to reset the UI to the login state.
Implemented the add admin handler with validation and Firebase integration.
Added a helper method to load all admins from Firebase into the observable list.

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added imports for security hashing, date formatting, and base64 encoding to support new admin authentication features.
Modified auth parameter construction to handle cases where no auth key is configured.
Added a constant for the admins database node to support admin management features.
Refactored canVote to fetch all voters and iterate locally instead of relying on a direct URL path lookup.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.before: String urlString = DATABASE_URL + VOTERS_NODE + "/" + voterId + ".json" + AUTH_PARAM;

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Refactored castVote to find the voter key by iterating all voters, ensuring the correct database key is used for updates.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.before: String voterUrl = DATABASE_URL + VOTERS_NODE + "/" + voterId + "/has_voted.json" + AUTH_PARAM;

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added error handling in castVote to log failures in marking voter status or incrementing counts without aborting the vote recording.
Added a new method getVoterById to retrieve a specific voter object by their ID.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.after: public static Voter getVoterById(String voterId) throws IOException {

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added admin authentication logic including password hashing and default admin creation.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.after: public static boolean authenticateAdmin(String username, String password) throws IOException {

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added method to add new admins with hashed passwords and creation dates.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.after: public static void addAdmin(String username, String password) throws IOException {

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added method to check if an admin username already exists in the database.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.after: public static boolean checkAdminExists(String username) throws IOException {

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added method to retrieve all admins from the database.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.after: public static Map<String, Admin> getAllAdmins() throws IOException {

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added helper method to hash passwords using SHA-256 and Base64.
Changed postToFirebase to return an empty string on failure instead of throwing an exception, allowing callers to handle errors gracefully.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.before:
throw new IOException("Firebase request failed with response code: " + responseCode + 
                                "\nResponse: " + response);

src/main/resources/org/main/voting/style.general_idea: Extend existing input field styling to include password fields for visual consistency.
Add styling rules for the new admin login form and its associated buttons.

src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.general_idea: Restructure the UI by moving management tabs (Candidates, Voters, Settings) into a new Admin tab protected by a login form.
src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.before: <Tab text="Manage Candidates" closable="false"> ... </Tab> <Tab text="Voter Registration" closable="false"> ... </Tab> <Tab text="Election Settings" closable="false"> ... </Tab>
src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.after: <Tab text="Admin" closable="false"> <content> <VBox> ... <TabPane fx:id="adminTabPane"> <tabs> <Tab text="Manage Candidates"> ... </Tab> <Tab text="Voter Registration"> ... </Tab> <Tab text="Election Settings"> ... </Tab> <Tab text="Admin Management"> ... </Tab> </tabs> </TabPane> ... </VBox> </content> </Tab>
